DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendants' Demurrer to 1st amended complaint and Motion to Strike portions of Plaintiffs first amended complaint are heard concurrently.

Appearances:
Michael F. Donner, esq. and Patrick Loi, esq. (415-777-3200/415-995-3591) of Hanson Bridgett for Plaintiff/opposing party Robert Duffy and Judith Duffy.
Dana Andreoli, esq. (415-421-3400) of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith LLP for Defendants/Moving party MICHAEL KAWAJA and HAZEL KAWAJA.
Steve Auburn (no information provided)

Defendant ARGUED re: declaratory relief, defending meritless claim, citation of Lilienthal, exclusive use and enjoyment. Defendant requested 20 days to file an answer, plaintiff does not object, The Court approves. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs MICHAEL KAWAJA and HAZEL KAWAJA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 20 days to answer. All causes of action are sufficiently alleged. An order for the demurrer and motion to strike is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

Defendants Kawajas Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendants' Demurrer to 1st amended complaint and Motion to Strike portions of Plaintiffs first amended complaint are heard concurrently.

Appearances:
Michael F. Donner, esq. and Patrick Loi, esq. (415-777-3200/415-995-3591) of Hanson Bridgett for Plaintiff/opposing party Robert Duffy and Judith Duffy.
Dana Andreoli, esq. (415-421-3400) of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith LLP for Defendants/Moving party MICHAEL KAWAJA and HAZEL KAWAJA.
Steve Auburn (no information provided)

Defendant ARGUED re: declaratory relief, defending meritless claim, citation of Lilienthal, exclusive use and enjoyment. Defendant requested 20 days to file an answer, plaintiff does not object, The Court approves. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs MICHAEL KAWAJA and HAZEL KAWAJA's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint is DENIED. An order for the demurrer and motion to strike is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
